name: Eonix E.U. Region
notes:
The following AS49532 :: Eonix Global Internet AS Number carries routes for the following markets:  

- Frankfurt DE
- Amsterdam NL

Should you wish to peer in our Western North America or Eastern North America markets please visit the following links: 

Eastern NA
https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/62904

Western NA
https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/30693

Peering requests for AS49532 are primarily comprised of requests within the European region. All other requests outside of this region may be submitted to us via the above peering links that correspond to the appropriate region
